name: android-sms-gateway-server-node
description: Node.js rewrite of the SMS Gateway for Android server for managed Node hosting.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/errors.js && node --check src/events.js && node --check src/services.js && node --check src/routes/mobile.js && node --check src/routes/thirdparty.js && node --check src/routes/system.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.js
